subject: docs(cleanup): verify backend — delete stale SPEC, trim dead TODO items
body:
Checked the tool-till-tees repo via the GitHub API. Of the 8 items
tracked in docs/SPEC_tool_till_tees_additions.md, 7 are shipped:

- §1a intent/summary_* in validateModuleUpdate (lib/sancio/validation.ts:212–292)
- §1b sender_tone in validateNoteInput (line 346)
- §1c sender_tone in validateProposalInput (line 395)
- §2a POST /projects/:id/accept-handshake (router line 45–47)
- §2b POST /modules/:id/move (router line 77)
- §2c POST /modules/batch-ready (router line 70)
- §3a–3e unscoped GET handlers (all list handlers accept optional
  parent IDs and fall back to user-scoped queries)

Only the bulk /api/sancio/module-versions endpoint is still missing —
which is what makes useModules do an N+1 fetch.

Deleted the SPEC file (now obsolete), stripped §N cross-references
from the 7 src/ files that pointed at it, collapsed the TODO
"Backend: Implement tool-till-tees Additions" section to the single
remaining item, dropped the CLAUDE.md Architecture + README doc-index
entries, and updated the CLAUDE.md AI Note to direct missing-field
work to docs/TODO.md instead of the deleted SPEC.

Tags: documentation, cleanup, backend-verification
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: cross-fleet-docs
Semver: patch
